info.heroSub: Designing the unseen. Engineering the impossible.
info.valueText: We bridge the gap between aesthetics and performance.
info.valueTextFaded: Delivering scalable digital products that drive business forward.
info.aboutText1: We are an independent digital agency.
info.aboutText2: Working at the intersection of logical engineering and creative thinking.
info.aboutText3: We don't just build websites; we engineer digital ecosystems.
info.ctaSub: Stop overthinking. Start building. Let's talk about how to bring your next big project to life.

projects.p1Desc: Complete architectural overhaul for a fintech data provider. Redesigned the user interface to boost processing speed by 400%.
projects.p2Desc: Seamless Web3 onboarding experience design. We removed complexity to create an easy path for new crypto users.
projects.p3Desc: E-commerce platform optimization resulting in a 35% increase in conversion rate. Custom headless Shopify architecture with Sanity CMS.
projects.p4Desc: Real-time network security monitoring dashboard with AI-driven threat detection and visualization.
projects.p5Desc: Brand identity and immersive web experience for a high-end photography studio, focusing on minimal aesthetics.
projects.p6Desc: Smart home integration platform for energy efficiency monitoring and automation using IoT technology.
projects.p7Desc: Supply chain optimization tool using blockchain for transparent and efficient tracking of global shipments.
projects.p8Desc: Educational platform focused on marine conservation, featuring interactive 3D models of coral reefs.

footer.tagline: The spark for all things creative.
